circuit drawn: drafts/circuits/u-diss.tex; compiles cleanly, layout verified

Basics subsection drafted by thesis-writer, reviewed by draft-checker, two critical issues fixed (broken back-reference to 'preceding subsection' replaced with explicit \S Quantum~states pointer; over-promised 'classical controls' forward-reference replaced with 'post-selected on a desired result'), CNOT casing fixed. Compiles cleanly in main.tex (100 pages), no new warnings introduced. Inserted at lines 799-817 of supplementary-informations/1_preliminaries.tex. Review at drafts/quantum-circuits-basics-review.md, draft archive at drafts/quantum-circuits-basics.md.

Plot generated at drafts/plots/transition_weights.{pdf,png}: γ_G (Gaussian), γ_M (kinky Metropolis), γ_M^{(s)} (smooth Metropolis, s=0.25), γ_Gl (Glauber). β=10, σ=ω_γ=σ_γ=1/β (Chen et al. convention). Colour scheme to be revisited later.

Not a bug — different substitutions are correct. γ uses substitution u² = x − βσ²/2, yielding u_min = √(βσ²·s/2) (matches thesis line 302). α uses u² = x, yielding u_min = √(βσ²·(1+s)/2) (matches thesis line 402). Both forms come from the same integral with lower limit βσ²(1+s)/2 (thesis eq:smooth-metro-int-defi line 293), they just differ by which substitution variable is used. metro-funcs.md line 18 vs line 38 was internally inconsistent (likely typo on line 18); thesis 2_methods.tex is the authoritative source and resolves it: γ uses √s, α uses √(1+s). Confirmed by user.

Commit 25ff241: pick_transition now uses the smooth-erfc branch for any (s != 0, including a=0) in all four variants (KMS/GNS × 2-arg/closure). Validation: trace distance to Gibbs is 6.6e-15 in EnergyDomain at (a=0, s=0.4), confirming γ-α consistency. The O(t₀) residual in TimeDomain is from the t=0 trapezoidal-quadrature interaction with the η-regularized b_+, intrinsic to the time-domain pipeline and unrelated to this fix.

Done. scripts/plot_b_plus_b_minus.jl produces drafts/plots/b_plus.{pdf,png} and drafts/plots/b_minus.{pdf,png}. β=10, σ=1/β, s=0.25, η=0.05; sanity checks against L'Hôpital limits and odd-parity of b_- pass to machine precision.
Tier-1 corpus complete: 32/32 lit-reviews under drafts/literature-review/ + corpus index. Synthesis (qf-yk4.2) is the next step.

Wrote scripts/plot_oft_smearing.jl. Plots two L²-normalized Gaussian filters \hat{f}(\omega - \nu_i) with the canonical Chen et al. parameters (β=10, σ=1/β=0.1) at ν₁=-0.10 and ν₂=+0.20 (separation 3σ ≈ 0.9·FWHM). Overlap region shaded with deepplum to mark the smearing-induced ambiguity. Output drafts/plots/oft_smearing.{pdf,png}.
Phase 1 landed in 0cf2ab1: src/discriminant.jl with DiscriminantBuffers and gibbs_fractional_powers, 28 new tests in test/test_discriminant.jl all passing, full suite (1810/1810) green.
